title: ilex amara f. ovalifolia
intro: Ilex amara f. ovalifolia, also known as the spiny wintergreen, is a variety of evergreen shrub in the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) characterized by its oval-shaped leaves and spiny stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and ease respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The spiny wintergreen has been valued for its health benefits, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Ilex amara f. ovalifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
